name: Gold timing
why_it_died: Identical to gold buy-and-hold beta — no timing alpha. The 0.686 is the 2023-26 gold bull

name: Core legacy multi-rule
why_it_died: Gold-beta again; underperforms plain buy-and-hold. The DSR is borrowed market beta.

name: Equity XS momentum
why_it_died: Best in-sample config is long-only beta on a survivorship panel; the true long/short spread is negative.

name: GA rule miner
why_it_died: 88,632 trials manufactured an in-sample 1.88; negative once you charge 3x cost. The paper result was a zero-cost artifact.

name: Macro surprise continuation
why_it_died: Registered trial net -0.79bp/event; the real continuation gross +0.6bp sits below the 1.4-4bp cost bar. Both halves negative.

name: TSMOM ensemble
why_it_died: Headline Sharpe 1.72 was selection; honest pure-OOS ~0.11, best in-sample ~0 net of cost, OOS negative. Wound down.

name: Cross-asset TSMOM
why_it_died: Long-biased = the bull-market beta; negative at 3x cost plus financing. -40% OOS drawdown.

name: Macro RORO
why_it_died: In-sample noise; -33% OOS drawdown. A price-proxy RORO

name: Weather to gas-storage nowcast
why_it_died: Nowcast is REAL (walk-forward R2 0.946) but public weather is already priced (corr -0.03), the genuine edge is licensed numerical-weather data, and contango ~18%/yr buries it. All 10 variants net-negative, placebo p=0.45.

name: Cross-asset mean reversion
why_it_died: Overfit-selection decay. This family is now 6x-confirmed dead across rebuilds.

name: Carry + trend
description: FX carry tilt blended with trend
why_it_died: In-sample 0.35 to OOS 0, -36% drawdown. Effectively a carry-tilted trend; the successor failed PBO 0.706 too.

name: Turn-of-month seasonality
why_it_died: Effect survives cost AND lag (rare) but DSR 0.044 on 234 calendar trials — real
column16: but too weak to clear deflation.

name: Shipping import-volume to equity
why_it_died: Best research artifact: in-sample DSR 0.77 deflating 15 trials, REAL. Dies live on three walls — no free firm-level import data, per-name IC 0.020 holds ~4 names at retail size, and after 50% decay plus cost the live edge is ~2.4%/yr, DSR 0.037.

name: FX strength + trend
why_it_died: Selection luck — the median in-sample config is already negative; OOS -0.17.

name: Month-end FX flow
why_it_died: Faithful rebuild reproduces +9bp full-sample, but post-2019 OOS Sharpe -0.11 — the literature arbitraged it away. A paper bot is kept as zero-risk forward evidence only.

name: Pension-rebalance reversal
why_it_died: Real ~10bp/event but CFD cost plus financing kills it; even at futures cost it is sub-gate (DSR 0.040).

name: Intraday mean-reversion pairs
why_it_died: In-sample 5.47 is pure overfit, OOS -0.54. This family is 7x-confirmed dead; M5 is the worst, cost-dead timeframe.

name: COT positioning
why_it_died: In-sample 0.39 inverts to OOS -0.25. FX flows are published-null; the levels signal is a momentum costume.

name: Equity low-vol
why_it_died: Unhedged low-beta is just equity beta on a survivorship panel; DSR 0.003.

name: Forecast-to-fill
why_it_died: In-sample 0.75 to OOS -0.19. 10,371 trials = overfit noise.

name: Academic factor zoo
why_it_died: Untradeable academic long/short series; in-sample 2.28 overfit to OOS ~0, negative at cost.

name: Oil inventory surprise
why_it_died: Real +4bp/event gross but the front contract REVERSES post-print (registered trial -9.25bp at 3.2 sigma); DSR ~0

name: Cross-sectional value
why_it_died: Both forms fail (canonical Sharpe -0.46, DSR 0.0001). 5/5 slow-factor families now dead.

name: VWAP intraday
why_it_died: Gross edge < costs intraday; negative even in-sample. 2,331 trades bleed spread.

name: News sentiment
why_it_died: REAL feed, but in-sample 1.45 to OOS -0.06; the direction is wrong out of sample.

name: Liquidity-adjusted momentum
why_it_died: Reduces to intraday momentum plus stop/target; dies hard net of cost (-0.64 OOS).

name: Order-flow + DeepLOB
why_it_died: REAL exchange LOB, but order-flow is trend not contrarian; +1.3bp/trade dies at 3x cost to -14.6. DSR 0 vs selection-max 0.78.

name: Session clock
why_it_died: In-sample 2.65 INVERTS to OOS -1.98. Pure overfit.

name: Directional-change overlay
why_it_died: In-sample 0.51 sign-flips to OOS -0.27.

name: Jump momentum
why_it_died: Placebo INVERTED — post-jump FX is reversal, not continuation. In-sample 0.42 to OOS ~0.

name: Macro surprise (aggressive)
why_it_died: OOS n=29 < 50 (fails min-trades), DSR 0, placebo-equivalent.

name: Auction-cycle reversal
why_it_died: Real post-leg reversal +11.9bp gross to +0.58bp net, below the cost bar; negative at 3x cost.

name: Post-earnings drift
why_it_died: Census NO-GO even at institutional size: effect-size death — you need ~1.5%/qtr and modern drift is 0-0.3%. Power is fine (N=269k); the edge itself has decayed.

name: Crowd-platform LGBM (off-gate)
description: Generic gradient-boosted model on a crowd platform
why_it_died: CORR-Sharpe 1.29 is trivially cheap, but the meta-model contribution metric is ~0/negative for crowd-like models. Off the firm gate; strongest no-capital route as a track-record asset.
